message:
Add metamorphic property tests for fr-store command invariants

Add 20 property-based tests verifying fundamental Redis semantics:
- SET/GET roundtrip identity
- INCR/DECR reversibility
- List LPUSH/RPOP queue behavior (FIFO)
- Set membership after SADD
- Hash field roundtrip via HSET/HGET
- ZADD/ZSCORE score preservation
- DEL removes key
- RENAME preserves value
- APPEND concatenation
- GETSET atomicity
- SETNX respects existing keys
- LPUSH/LLEN consistency
- SREM removes member
- HDEL removes field
- ZREM removes member
- Multiple INCR is additive
- COPY preserves both source and destination
- STRLEN equals value length
- HLEN equals unique field count
- EXISTS is false for nonexistent keys

Uses proptest with 1000 cases per test for good coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
